steps.title: Track the resolution
steps.content: The first sentence says Ellison struggles to reconcile nature's beauty and harshness. The second sentence gives the eventual understanding that those qualities are inseparably linked.

steps.title: Choose the final-outcome signal
steps.content: "Ultimately" marks the conclusion Ellison reaches after that struggle. B signals a means to a goal, C adds a point, and D signals a direct consequence, so they do not fit as well. The answer is A.
